narrative:
Sheffield Township has 2,176 registered voters, with 64.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.3 percentage points.
